name: Forklift accident in Ogden UT warehouse, any local rules?
description: Utah: 3-yr limit, 180-day notice, file w/ state fund—same as general but local filing.

mainEntity.name: Forklift accident in Ogden UT warehouse, any local rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 3-yr limit, 180-day notice, file w/ state fund—same as general but local filing.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah workers' comp governs: file with Employers Reinsurance Corp within 3 yrs, no-fault benefits.** Local OSHA enforces forklift training.[1][5] Key factors: Notify employer <180 days; third-party if contractor involved. Provo/Salt Lake courts handle suits. Consult UT attorney for state-specific forms/deadlines.
